betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Soups & Stews§f

§aBoil hearty soups and stews in the Pot for reliable hunger restoration.§f

All soups require §bStock§f (Pot + Water + seeds/spider eye/dirt) as a base. Most restore §e3-7 hunger§f.

§6Basic Soups§f: Vegetable (5), Chicken Noodle (6), Tomato (3), Carrot (4), Potato (4), Cucumber (4), Beet (4), Celery (5), Rice (3), Seed (3), Cactus (3), Spider Eye (4), Pumpkin (4).

§6Creamed Soups§f: Creamed Corn (3), Creamed Broccoli (6), Cream of Avocado (6).

§6Complex§f: Onion Soup (11), Split Pea (6), Turnip (6), Leek Bacon (5), Chicken Gumbo (9), Lamb Barley, Old World Veggie, Miner's Stew.

§eTip:§f Onion Soup at 11 hunger is one of the best soup-tier foods.
